Rapuntium, also known as the prickly thistle, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. The health benefits of Rapuntium include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of Rapuntium include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Rapuntium include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support digestive health and reduce inflammation.
